sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Leitungah dahna tam, lungsim launa tam,
Mun tengah gal gin nam, bangcih khong ding?
kiang zuan lecin, Ama hehna panin,
Tang misiangte bangin na suakta ding.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sun lai maw, zan maw, zing,
Si kik ngei nawn lo ding, vantung

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Itna hong kiam dinga, inn le lo bei ding hi
Hih teng hong tun takteh, beina nai ding hiveh,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Gimna ong beipah ding, tawntung lungdam den ding,
Vantung ah leng to ning, leitung mangpha khak ning,
